name: SMASHED POTATOES, PEAS, and CORN with CHILE-GARLIC OIL

ingredients.item: 12 small yellow potatoes (about 2 inches in diameter)
ingredients.original: 12 small yellow potatoes (about 2 inches in diameter)

ingredients.item: 2½ cups shelled green peas (about 2½ pounds fresh peas in the pod)
ingredients.original: 2½ cups shelled green peas (about 2½ pounds fresh peas in the pod)

ingredients.item: 2¼ cups sweet corn kernels (from about 3 ears of corn; store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)
ingredients.original: 2¼ cups sweet corn kernels (from about 3 ears of corn; store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)

ingredients.item: ¼ cup packed chopped flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup packed chopped flat-leaf parsley
